programme.desc: Its a tank-off as Henry Cole turns a redundant water tank into a mobile shelving unit in Oxfordshire, while Simon OBrien transforms some old tanks into a pizza oven in Liverpool.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien head on down to Suffolk where they meet Margaret - who is an avid collector as well as a former Mayor - and so they need to be on their very best behaviour.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins at Craig and Gretas Horseshoe Hotel in North Yorkshire. The guests love their eco approach to hosting, but some of the facilities are found to be lacking.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandBers head to The Dixie Arms in Leicestershire, run by super-welcoming host Alex. Two guests are impressed by the blingy beds, but another pair are worried about some facilities faults.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Matt hosts the weeks third visit, at Bradburys of Blackpool, where he hopes to change perceptions of the seaside town. Breakfast is a supersized affair, and the BandBers are suitably impressed.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandBers go glamping at Little Oakhurst, in Stonyhurst near Clitheroe, run by Andy and Joanne. The views are spectacular, but it soon becomes apparent that glamping isnt for everyone.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Theres plenty of score settling to be done on payment day, and after the BandBers differences are discussed and debated, the payments are revealed and they find out whos won the week.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: This week its Greater Manchester, and first host is 55-year-old DJ and hairdresser Mozz from Bury. He makes garlic stilton mushrooms and poached pear - will he impress the guests?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Manchester, and voice artist and film extra Matt hosts. He cooks up a Jewish Friday night supper, including his mums traditional chicken soup. Will it be meaty enough for his guests?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Manchester, and budding author and mum of five Cleona is next to host. Shes confident a menu based on her Jamaican roots will get her guests onside. But will it be enough to bag the £1000?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Next host in Manchester is Australian radio content director James. He hopes some Chinese cuisine and his mums cake recipe can create harmony and win the approval of his guests.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The final night in Manchester, and events boss Sharon hosts with her hearty decadent menu. Her skills and decorum are put to the test with Cleona - who will bag the weeks £1000 prize?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition commences at Churchills Hotel in Barnsley, run by Jeff and Vicky. Their ethos is luxury for less, but their first-ever breakfast service might damage their chances.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Danni and Graham host at Darnells Farm Luxury Glamping in Herefordshire. They hope that their luxury lodgings and a race through a maze will win them the week.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: On the third day of the competition, the BandBers visit Gloucester, where Natasha and Laura host at Hatton Court Hotel. The classic country style of the hotel is a big hit, but one guest has a restless night.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Were in the heart of Birmingham for the weeks final visit to The Ladbrooke Hotel. Host Snehal aims for perfection, but some of his guests think their rooms are far from flawless.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Its payment day, and one BandBer in particular is on the warpath. After some breakfast time bust-ups and plenty of tension, one team needs to be crowned the best value BandB of the week.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location

programme.sub-title: My Fair Nobby; Gimme a News Break

programme.desc: Heat in Portland, Ore.; exploring why some urban areas are hotter than others in Medellin, Colombia; a visit to Phoenix -- the hottest city in the U.S.

programme.title: King Arthurs Britain: The Truth Unearthed
programme.desc: In the fifth century, the future of Britain hung in the balance, after four centuries of straight roads and hot and cold running water the Romans upped and left, called back to support their own ailing Empire. The country quickly descended into chaos, plunging the native population into poverty and instability as their livelihoods, many dependent on the Romans, disappeared almost overnight. The nation was vulnerable and it didnt take long for Anglo-Saxon invaders to take advantage.

programme.title: Pirates: Behind the Legends
programme.desc: Englishman-turned-Algerian pirate John Ward becomes ruler of the Tunisian empire.

programme.title: Women Under Hitlers Flag
programme.desc: In 1942, a new phase of the genocide took place: the Final Solution. Women, far from being mere witnesses or accomplices, played a role as important as it was deadly.

programme.title: Iron Curtain: Living Under Soviet Occupation
programme.desc: Soviet domination of Eastern European countries will be total and will remain so until the dictators death in 1953.

programme.desc: the team restore a quirky trainset made by a celebrated cartoonist, a nautical `ditty box and a doll that is a precious memento of a much-loved father. Bookbinder Christopher Shaw restores a battered, weather-beaten dictionary believed to have been the personal possession of Lord Horatio Nelson, used on board his flagship HMS Victory.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: Drew and Viki hunt down surprising and desirable items. They visit a classic car collection in Durham and a favourite dealer in Edinburgh. They find deer antlers from a Cumbrian country house and industrial tables from a former tannery.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: Drew hits the road with Viki and Alister to visit some of his most trusted contacts, including a favourite dealer in Kent and a new shop in Lancaster.

programme.title: Aussie Gold Hunters

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: The final battleground for our intrepid auctioneers, Philip Serrell and Izzie Balmer, will be the antiques emporia of Lincolnshire and Nottinghamshire. Whilst our pair celebrate their new found friendship, it doesnt mean that theyve lost their competitive streak - theyre both in it to win it. And it looks like the third member of the team, their classic car, might be restored to its former glory. Phil, who has to play hunt-the-shopkeeper, has his eye on a few quality antique staples.

programme.desc: Jay Blades and the team bring three treasured family heirlooms, and the memories they hold, back to life. programme.title: Judge Rinders Crime Stories

programme.title: Murder on CCTV

programme.title: Blacklight
programme.desc: Travis Block, a shadowy government agent who specializes in removing operatives whose covers have been exposed, uncovers a deadly conspiracy within his own ranks that reaches the highest echelons of power.

programme.title: Rampage
programme.desc: Primatologist Davis Okoye shares an unshakable bond with George, an extraordinarily intelligent silverback gorilla thats been in his care since birth. When a genetic experiment goes wrong, it causes George, a wolf and a reptile to grow to a monstrous size. As the mutated beasts embark on a path of destruction, Okoye teams up with a discredited genetic engineer and the military to secure an antidote and prevent a global catastrophe.

programme.title: Fast and Furious 6
programme.desc: Since Dom and Brians heist in Rio they must live as fugitives. Meanwhile, Agent Hobbs has been tracking a gang of lethally skilled mercenary drivers. Hobbs asks Dom and his crew for help in exchange for full pardons for everyone.

programme.title: xXx
programme.desc: An extreme sports junkie is blackmailed by the CIA into taking on a highly dangerous mission to Prague in order to thwart the plans of a group of Russian extremists. The reluctant hero soon finds himself with the safety of the USA in his hands - and a complicated romance on the horizon.

programme.title: XXX 2: The Next Level
programme.desc: NSA Agent Augustus Gibbons, fresh off the success of his last renegade recruitment, once again finds himself in need of an outsider. Gibbons and his new agent must track a dangerous military splinter group that is conspiring to overthrow the US Government in the nations capital.

programme.title: xXx: The Return of Xander Cage
programme.desc: After coming out of self-imposed exile, daredevil operative Xander Cage must race against time to recover a sinister weapon known as Pandoras Box, a device that controls every military satellite in the world. Recruiting a new group of thrill-seeking cohorts, Xander finds himself entangled in a deadly conspiracy that points to collusion at the highest levels of government.

programme.title: The Long Kiss Goodnight
programme.desc: An amnesiac schoolteacher discovers she was formerly a government assassin when she hires a low-rent private eye to help fill the gaps in her memory. Together, they go on the run in a race against the clock to stop her former taskmasters from putting a heinous plan into action, before they can silence her for good.

programme.title: Gladiator II
programme.desc: Lucius must enter the Colosseum after the powerful emperors of Rome conquer his home. With rage in his heart and the future of the empire at stake, he looks to the past to find the strength and honour needed to return the glory of Rome to its people.

programme.title: Bumblebee
programme.desc: On the run in the year 1987, Bumblebee the Autobot finds refuge in a junkyard in a small California beach town. When 17-year-old Charlie revives him, she quickly learns that this is no ordinary yellow Volkswagen.

programme.title: Novocaine
programme.desc: When the girl of his dreams gets kidnapped, a man turns his inability to feel pain into an unexpected advantage as he fights a bunch of thugs to get her back.

programme.title: Jackie Chans First Strike
programme.desc: A Hong Kong detective is contracted to recover a stolen nuclear warhead. Hired by both the CIA and Russian intelligence, the kung-fu cop is harassed, assaulted and framed for murder as he delves into the murky world of international arms dealing.

programme.title: The Beekeeper
programme.desc: One mans brutal campaign for vengeance takes on national stakes after its revealed hes a former operative of a powerful and clandestine organisation known as Beekeepers.

programme.title: Into the Wonderwoods
programme.desc: Ten-year-old Angelo, an aspiring explorer, is left behind by his distracted parents at a rest stop. He then ventures into a forest inhabited by strange, wonderful creatures to find them.

programme.title: Riverdance
programme.desc: An Irish boy and a Spanish girl journey into the mythical world of the Megaloceros Giganteus who teach them to appreciate Riverdance as a celebration of life.

programme.title: Teen Titans GO! to the Movies

programme.title: The Bad Guys 2
programme.desc: Reformed criminals Mr. Wolf, Mr. Snake, Mr. Piranha, Mr. Shark and Ms. Tarantula find themselves hijacked into a high-stakes heist thats masterminded by a new team of delinquents they never saw coming -- the Bad Girls.

programme.title: Tim Burtons Corpse Bride
programme.desc: Anxious not to make a mistake in his wedding ceremony, Victor goes to the woods to practise his vows. Unfortunately, he slides the ring onto the twig-finger of a long-dead bride who has been waiting years for a suitor.

programme.title: Despicable Me 4
programme.desc: Gru welcomes a new member to the family, Gru Jr., whos intent on tormenting his dad. However, their peaceful existence soon comes crashing down when criminal mastermind Maxime Le Mal escapes from prison and vows revenge against Gru.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania 3: A Monster Vacation
programme.desc: Mavis surprises Dracula with plans for a fun-filled summer voyage on a monster cruise. As the pack starts enjoying colossal buffets and exotic excursions, Drac finds himself falling for the ships intriguing but dangerous captain. He soon learns that trying to balance family, friends and romance might just be too much to handle. even for the worlds most powerful vampire.

programme.desc: The sequel to `Madagascar, in which New York Zoo animals, Alex the Lion, Marty the Zebra, Melman the Giraffe and Gloria the Hippo, still stranded on Madagascar, start to leave the island. All of a sudden, they land in the wilderness of Africa, where Alex meets the rest of his family, but has trouble communicating with them after spending so much time at the Central Park Zoo.

programme.title: 10 Lives
programme.desc: A pampered cat takes for granted the lucky hand he has been dealt after he is rescued and loved by Rose, a kind-hearted and passionate student. When he loses his ninth life, fate steps in to set him on a transformative journey.

programme.title: Smurfs: The Lost Village
programme.desc: With the evil wizard Gargamel hot on their trail, Smurfette, Brainy, Clumsy and Hefty embark on a journey through the Forbidden Forest to find a mysterious village.

programme.title: The Cinema List: Bingeable
programme.desc: On the Cinema List, join us as we explore our favourite franchises to get cosy with, from Transformers to Bad Boys 2. Snuggle down on the sofa and take your pick.

programme.title: Role Models
programme.desc: Danny is sour after driving away his girlfriend, and Wheeler is into anything wearing a skirt. The two get into a fight with a trucker and choose community service over a jail term.

programme.title: The First Wives Club
programme.desc: When Brenda Cushman, Elise Elliot and Annie Paradis are reunited at the funeral of a college friend, they discover they have another thing in common: theyve all been dumped by their husbands, Morty, Bill and Aaron, for a younger model. Vowing revenge, they decide to hit them where it hurts most: the pocket. Using help and their various skills, they begin to pick them off one by on.

programme.title: Miss Congeniality 2: Armed and Fabulous
programme.desc: FBI agent Gracie is given another makeover to become the face of the Bureau, prior to embarking on a promotional tour. When two of her friends are kidnapped - Miss USA and a beauty pageant director - she decides to investigate on her own, in defiance of orders to the contrary.

The Miami Dolphins are aghast when their beloved Snowflake is abducted one week before the all-important Super Bowl, so they call in Ace Ventura, a private eye who uses unorthodox methods to retrieve missing animals.

programme.title: Ace Ventura: When Nature Calls
programme.desc: Sequel about the zany private detective who specialises in locating missing pets. Ace Ventura travels to Africa to search for a kidnapped sacred albino bat, which reputedly has the power to restore peace between two warring tribes.

programme.title: Youve Got Mail
programme.desc: Two rival bookstore owners are unaware that they are conducting a secret romance with each other on the Internet. When they discover the truth, they must prevent their business rivalry from interfering with their growing personal intimacy.

programme.desc: Jim and Michelle are getting married and Jim struggles to win over his future in-laws and deal with his embarrassing dad. Meanwhile, Stifler isnt invited to the ceremony, but hes determined not to be left out.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop III
programme.desc: Axel Foley and his Beverly Hills buddies investigate criminal activities at a Southern California amusement park.

programme.title: American Pie: Reunion
programme.desc: Outrageous antics ensue when Jim, Michelle, Stifler and the gang get back together for their 13-year high school reunion.

At the Winter Olympics, the fierce rivals find themselves forced to share the winners podium when they both score gold. The shower of glory doesnt last for long, as the pair descend into fisticuffs and set the mascot on fire. Disgraced and stripped of their medals, they can get back on ice, but only if they dance with each other as a pair.

programme.title: Mean Girls
programme.desc: After 15 years in African bush country, Cady knows all about herd instincts, but nothing has prepared her for high school. She joins a popular but cruelly manipulative crowd of girls known as the `Plastics and secretly mocks them, but the fun stops when one betrays her and steals the boy she fancies.

programme.title: Cool Hand Luke
programme.desc: A gutsy prisoner earns the admiration of inmates and the wrath of guards by constant defiance and bids for freedom.

programme.desc: Once the highly regarded composer to the Viennese Court, Salieri is now an old man, unknown and confined to an asylum. After a suicide attempt he recounts his story to a young cleric, going back 30 years to his heyday at the court of Emperor Joseph II, where he first met the young Mozart. Despite Salieris Machiavellian attempts to frustrate Mozarts progress, the great young composer attracts the favour of the Emperor.

programme.title: Empire of the Sun
programme.desc: Young Jim has to grow up fast after the Japanese invade Shanghai. Separated from his parents and alone in a prisoner of war camp, Jim must fight to survive.

programme.title: Legends of the Fall
programme.desc: Sweeping epic about three sons raised on a Montana ranch by their father, a colonel who has turned his back on the army after the Indian Wars. Though the destinies of the boys are very different, two forces impact on each of their lives: the Great War in Europe and the love of a young woman. Covering several decades, the action ranges from majestic Montana to the battlefields of Europe and adventure on the high seas.

programme.title: Horizon: An American Saga: Chapter 1
programme.desc: In 1859 families discover the lure of the Old West as they settle in territories from Wyoming to Kansas. Meanwhile, a gruff cowboy soon finds himself on the run with a prostitute and a young boy after killing a fellow gunman.

programme.title: An Officer and a Gentleman
programme.desc: At a tough training school for American navy pilots, one of the new intake falls foul of the hard-as-nails drill sergeant, but takes it on the chin, and finds the additional strength to help a fellow student who is feeling the pressure.

programme.title: Turtles All the Way Down
programme.desc: When a 16-year-old struggling with obsessive-compulsive disorder reconnects with her childhood crush, she faces the potential of finding love and happiness despite her mental condition.

programme.desc: Inside his book, Harold can make anything come to life simply by drawing it. After he grows up and draws himself off the books pages and into the real world, he learns his trusty crayon can set off more hilarious hijinks than he thought possible.

programme.desc: Papa and the rest of the Smurfs reunite with their human friends to rescue Smurfette from the clutches of evil wizard Gargamel.

programme.desc: The Spy Kids set off on their third adventure. Secret Agent Carmen finds herself trapped in a 3-D virtual reality video game designed by their new arch nemesis, the Toymaker. Juni must save his sister, as they battle it out against lifelike 3-D monsters, completing each progressively harder level and ultimately trying to save the youth of the world.

programme.title: Smurfs
programme.desc: When evil wizards Razamel and Gargamel take Papa Smurf, the Smurfs embark on a mission to the real world to save him. With help from some new friends, they must discover what defines their destiny to save the universe.

All of a sudden, they land in the wilderness of Africa, where Alex meets the rest of his family, but has trouble communicating with them after spending so much time at the Central Park Zoo.

programme.title: Westworld
programme.desc: Acclaimed futuristic chiller about two strait-laced businessmen who go to a theme park in which robots help them live out the adventures of their dreams. While taking part in a Wild West-style saloon shoot-out, one of the robots malfunctions, retaliating in high-noon fashion. Suddenly the men find their lives are in grave danger as they are stalked by a cowboy robot who will stop at nothing to eliminate them.

programme.title: Critters
programme.desc: Hilarity and horror ensue when toothy, carnivorous aliens escape from their space prison, pursued by two merciless bounty hunters. When they reach the Kansas farmhouse of an all-American family, the humans do everything they can to fend off the critters, but they cannot free themselves of the ferocious outsiders.

programme.title: Caddyshack
programme.desc: A rich property developer wants to take over an exclusive country club and so challenges its pompous president to a game of golf leading to utter mayhem, and a stream of surreal and crude visual gags.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: An alcoholic millionaire is threatened with losing his inheritance if he does not marry the girl of his parents choosing. Despite his dislike for his prospective bride, he bows to the inevitable only to meet a light-fingered waitress who steals his heart. John Gielgud won an Oscar for his role as Arthurs loyal but outspoken valet.

programme.title: Raiders of the Lost Ark
programme.desc: Epic tale in which an intrepid archaeologist tries to beat a band of Nazis to a unique religious relic which is central to their plans for world domination. Battling against a snake phobia and a vengeful ex-girlfriend, Indiana Jones is in constant peril, making hairs-breadth escapes at every turn in this celebration of the innocent adventure movies of an earlier era.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom
programme.desc: Adventure sequel. Intrepid archaeologist Indiana Jones, on the trail of fortune and glory in Old Shanghai, is ricocheted into a dangerous adventure in India. With his faithful companion Short Round and nightclub singer Willie Scott, Indie goes in search of the magical Sankara stone, and uncovers an ancient evil which threatens all who come into contact with it.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade
programme.desc: The intrepid explorer Indiana Jones sets out to rescue his father, a medievalist who has vanished while searching for the Holy Grail. Following clues in the old mans notebook, Indy arrives in Venice, where he enlists the help of a beautiful academic, but they are not the only ones who are on the trail, and some sinister old enemies soon come out of the woodwork.

programme.title: Blazing Saddles
programme.desc: Irreverent spoof about a black sheriff hired by a crooked speculator to drive citizens out of an all-white town which lies in the path of a railroad. The townspeople turn on the inexperienced sheriff, and he is forced to turn to a convict, once the fastest gun in the West, for help.

programme.title: The Naked Gun: From the Files of Police Squad!
programme.desc: Hard-boiled incompetent cop Frank Drebin must stop the evil Vincent Ludwig from completing his diabolical plan of killing Elizabeth II.

programme.title: The Naked Gun 2 1/2: The Smell of Fear
programme.desc: Lt Frank Debrin uncovers a plot by the polluting energy giants to de-rail ecological plans that could render their products redundant. Theyre led by the evil Quentin Hapsburg who, to make matters worse, is romancing Franks ex, Jane Spencer.

programme.title: The Naked Gun 33 1/3: The Final Insult
programme.desc: Clueless cop Frank Drebin is hauled out of retirement to save the Oscars ceremony from mad bombers. Anna Nicole Smith provides support in this comic sequel.

programme.title: The Golden Child
programme.desc: A social worker who specialises in missing children is recruited to rescue a mystical Tibetan child from evil forces.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: The twins are asked to collect McCogginss bell for a town performance. Despite Battersbys warning that the clapper is fragile and doesnt have a spare, Tommy and Tallulah manage to break it. Deciding that they must make a replacement, they look everywhere for something to use and try some very unusual options. Will the bell be ready for Chime Time?

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: When Tommy and Tallulah agree to babysit the spring chicks while Madame Au Lait tends to Mother Chicks hurt wing, they dont realise that how much of a handful the chicks will be. The twins are also taking part in the town kite display today, but somehow the chicks end up surfing on their kite, high in the sky! The twins must stage an airborne rescue before Chime Time.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: Tommy and Tallulah are organising McCogginss pile of interesting junk when a vitally important spring goes missing. They cant chime the time without it! The twins chase the spring all over town as it bounces around causing chaos, eventually ending up attaching Pufferty to his kennel. Every time he tries to go somewhere, the spring pulls him back.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: McCoggins tells the twins not to stray far, but they forget to warn Pufferty when they try to teach him how to play hide and seek. There are not many places in Tickety Town big enough to hide a huge dog train, so Pufferty heads far off into the hills. Where can he be? The race is on to find him by Chime Time.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: Tommy and Tallulah find harvesting very slow when they volunteer to pick Lopsiloos vegetables. Surely there must be some way to speed it up? However, when they hit upon the idea of using Pufferty to pull all the vegetables up at once, they are shocked to find that Puffertys carriages unhook and run amok through Tickety Town.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: The twins are asked to deliver a precious package to Madame Au Lait and decide that a ride with Pufferty is safest way to transport it. However, when Hopparoo challenges the lovable dog train to a race, the package bounces out of the carriage and embarks upon a crazy journey round Tickety Town, with Tommy and Tallulah in hot pursuit.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: Tickety Town is covered in fallen leaves, so Tommy and Tallulah are using McCogginss new prototype street sweeper to clear them. However, in their eagerness to speed things up, they go against his instructions and press the turbo button. Suddenly, the sweeper goes haywire, rampaging through town and sucking up anything in its path, including Madame Au Laits clock key and very nearly Hopparoo too.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: The whole town gathers to take part in McCoggins treasure hunt. Whoever finds the most cogs will be the winner. Knowing that McCoggins hides the cogs in the same places every year, Tommy and Tallulah are cruising to victory, until they realise that a quick win will spoil everyones day, but when they borrow McCoggins special clockwork rollerskates to put the cogs back, the skates zoom out of control.

programme.desc: In 2022, 35-year-old Zara Aleena was beaten to death just ten minutes from her London home, but the only evidence left by her brutal killer was one bloody fingerprint at the crime scene.

programme.title: Forensics: Catching the Killer
programme.desc: In 1975, 11-year-old schoolgirl Lesley Molseed went to the shops and never returned to her family home in West Yorkshire. The ensuing police investigation led to a tragic miscarriage of justice before DNA evidence identified the true killer.

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: TPol, Hoshi and Reed become stranded aboard a disabled Klingon vessel after they are ambushed by a female Klingon.

programme.title: The Swarm
programme.desc: New and Exclusive. Cecile recommends stopping fishing off the coast and warning the population against using tap water, while the worms are investigated more closely. (S1, ep 4)

programme.title: The Force: North East
programme.desc: Theres a tense stand-off as officers try to talk down a man brandishing a samurai sword. The cells fill up during a busy Saturday night in Newcastle.

programme.title: Brit Cops: Law and Disorder
programme.desc: The City of London police safeguard the square mile at the heart of a crime-ridden capital.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: Senior constables Ash and Paul are patrolling residential streets when they witness a driver undertaking a dangerous burnout in front of them. Senior Constable Matt saves an injured dog in danger of straying onto the road.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: More footage from Australia as we follow the men and women of the highways agencies as they patrol the countrys roads and freeways.

programme.title: Border Patrol
programme.desc: Customers uncover concealed drugs. Biosecurity New Zealand find some troublesome items in a spiritual healers luggage.

programme.title: Gladiators
programme.desc: Going up against some of Australias wiliest gladiators and their impressive arsenals and looking into whether these weapons, such as the kangaroos deadly boxing moves, can help them survive the ravages of climate change.

programme.title: Deep Dive Australia
programme.desc: Exploring the shores of the Northern Territory and the abundant waters of the Great Barrier Reef. Facing flooded roads, hungry saltwater crocs, and killer jellyfish, Lizzie investigates why so many strange creatures make this remote area home.

programme.title: Great Lakes Wild
programme.desc: With seven of Ontarios eight turtle species listed as endangered, the push is on to keep population numbers up. But turtles are slow and not entirely smart, which means they keep taking a beating from predators, and from cars.

programme.title: Great Lakes Wild
programme.desc: A dam is an engineering feat, controlling massive amounts of water. But it can also wreak havoc on the animals that call those waters home.

programme.desc: A devil-worshiping woman sends out her four beautiful nieces to find young men, who are lured back to her place so they can be killed, ground up, and sold as meat pies.

programme.desc: Uncle Fred suggests to his nephew that they visit a suburb, Mitching Hill, formerly an estate owned by family when he was younger. They go there and begin disrupting the lives of a suburban family.

programme.desc: A killer blackmails a teenager with a record into robbing a safe.

programme.desc: Founder of Talking Pictures TV and one half of the Footage Detectives, Noel Cronin, shares shows and films not to be missed throughout April.

programme.title: Black Saddle
programme.desc: Clay learns that one of his friends, an ex-gunfighter, has been lynched.

programme.title: Topper Returns
programme.desc: After switching her bedroom with a wealthy friend, a happy-go-lucky young woman becomes the victim of a brutal murder. Her ghost returns and elicits the help of a banker to find the murderer and the motive behind the crime.

programme.title: Fathers Little Dividend
programme.desc: When Stanley Banks hears that his daughter Kay is having a baby, he feels to young and vibrant to be a grandfather. Things only get worse, as he and wife Ellie find themselves in a competition with their daughters in-laws to see who can be the best grandparents.

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: A renowned safecracker and his men attempt to rob a bank by entering the vault through the sewer system.

programme.title: Emergency
programme.desc: The search for a blood donor to save the life of a dying little girl as her parents examine their marital problems in the face of adversity. Although three well-known donors who share the rare blood type of the injured child have been identified - a soccer player, a fugitive killer and an atomic scientist - they prove highly difficult to trace.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sir Lancelot
programme.desc: Sir Lancelot is faced with opposition from the other knights when he insists that his squire be trained to become a knight of the Round Table.

programme.title: Blanche Fury
programme.desc: Victorian melodrama centred around Blanche Fuller, a young woman whose arrival as governess on a family estate is the catalyst for betrayal, the revelation of old family secrets and murder. Philip Thorn is the scheming illegitimate son who sees Blanche as his way to reclaim what he believes to be rightfully his.

programme.title: Crown Court
programme.sub-title: The Flight of the Lapwing - Part 1
programme.desc: The pilot and only survivor of a light aircraft crash is suing a relative of one of the victims for libel.

programme.title: Crown Court
programme.sub-title: The Flight of the Lapwing - Part 2
programme.desc: The cause of the crash was carbon monoxide, but nothing was found in the tissue of the dead.

programme.title: Crown Court
programme.sub-title: The Flight of the Lapwing - Part 3
programme.desc: Mrs Simon claims she knew the pilot was prone to epileptic fits. She calls him a liar and a killer.

programme.title: David Bailey, Four Beats to the Bar and No Cheating
programme.desc: From Vogue magazine fashion photographer to filmmaker, painter and sculptor, David Bailey is a cultural icon who has been at the cutting edge of contemporary art for 50 years. A working-class Londoner, he befriended the stars, married his muses and still captures the spirit and elegance of his times with his refreshingly simple approach and razor-sharp eye.

programme.title: Four Star Playhouse
programme.desc: Featuring four rotating stars, from surreal mysteries to light comedies, which became famous in 1952.

programme.title: Whats on TPTV with Noel
programme.desc: Founder of Talking Pictures TV and one half of the Footage Detectives, Noel Cronin, shares shows and films not to be missed throughout April.

programme.title: Strange But True
programme.desc: Michael Aspel delves into stories of the supernatural with healer Lorraine Ham from the last series, and Ray Bryant with his extraordinary journey into his past.

programme.title: The Brothers
programme.desc: An uncomfortable evening is in store for Mary and Jennifer at a party and trouble brews between the Carter and Hammond drivers.

programme.title: Saber of London
programme.desc: Mark Saber sets a trap to catch the thug Freddie Keppel after he shoots blackmail victim Tom Wright.

programme.title: The Wheeltappers and Shunters Social Club
programme.desc: Its New Years Eve! Bernard Manning and Colin Crompton are joined by a variety of acts including Frank Carson, Peter Gordeno, Mike Harding and Russ Conway.

programme.title: That Summer
programme.desc: A teenager gets out of reform school and heads to Torquay for a seaside vacation with three friends. However, their fun is interrupted by a gang of Scottish punks who come to cause trouble.

programme.title: Hands of a Stranger
programme.desc: Surgeon transplants slain mans hands to concert pianist.

programme.title: Doomwatch
programme.desc: Doomwatch investigates when an officer dies in mysterious circumstances.

programme.title: The Undertaker
programme.desc: An undertaker makes the wrong choice at a moral crossroads as he is made to dispose of the victims of a gangsters power grab.

programme.title: The Gentle Trap
programme.desc: After intercepting two gangsters who have just robbed a jewellery store, a crafty crook finds himself on the run from the law and the ruthless leader of the gang.

programme.title: The Gentle Trap
programme.desc: After intercepting two gangsters who have just robbed a jewellery store, a crafty crook finds himself on the run from the law and the ruthless leader of the gang.

programme.title: Shop: Dormeo Mattresses
programme.desc: Mattresses and toppers from Dormeo: the home of a great nights sleep, available for purchase.

programme.title: 60s Non-Stop
programme.desc: Featuring a compilation of non-stop music from the 1960s.

programme.title: Patton Mystery
programme.desc: A famed US general was injured in a car crash in Germany, appeared to recover, then died suddenly. Accident, murder, or post war tension? Narrated by Robert Powell.

programme.title: That Was Nam
programme.desc: The evolution of the Vietnam conflict from a regional military engagement to an ever-expanding war. Exploring how it was logistically possible, as told by grunts who lived it, including scenes from bomb sights and gun sights.

programme.title: Wrecks That Changed the World
programme.desc: Investigators examine two decaying Second World War wrecks, the SS Skytteren and SS Richard Montgomery, whose dormant cargoes now pose a deadly threat.

programme.title: Where Were You?
programme.desc: There are some news events that change the world. In todays episode we look at the events of September 11th 2001.

programme.title: Icons
programme.desc: Arnold Schwarzenegger started his career as a bodybuilder, a fact that later helped him in the acting career which followed. He then became politically active, winning his seat as Governor of California in 2003.

programme.title: Historys Greatest Aircraft
programme.desc: The Republic P-47 Thunderbolt proved to be a successful high-altitude fighter during the Second World War, and it also became Americas foremost fighter-bomber in the ground-attack role.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War
programme.desc: As the war encompasses the globe, the conflict takes root in Africa. Mussolini sends ill-prepared soldiers into the field, forcing Germany to come to his aid.

programme.title: Special Forces
programme.desc: We compare the elite teams at the frontlines of the fight against terror against past battles comparing American riflemen and British line soldiers and the story of Timothy Murphy the American sniper.

programme.title: Coastal Warfare in WWII
programme.desc: RAF Coastal Command is perhaps the lesser-known of Britains wartime RAF Commands, but the tasks and challenges they faced during the Second World War were gigantic and ranged from submarine-hunting to convoy protection.

programme.title: Battleplan
programme.desc: Even before the Greeks used a wooden horse to capture Troy, deception was a critical part of warfare. In this programme we examine Operation Fortitude, the range of plans which hid the location of the D-Day Landings.

programme.title: Heroes of World War II
programme.desc: How the mathematical geniuses of Bletchley Park, otherwise known as Station X, cracked Nazi Germanys enigma code for the Allies.

programme.title: Weapons of World War II
programme.desc: The series on World War II weaponry continues with a look at the development of rockets, especially the German V1 and V2 which terrorised south-east England in 1944.

programme.title: Secrets of WW2
programme.desc: From the embarrassment of surrender, the French Resistance developed over the course of WWII into an effective and brave fighting force. They played a key role in the liberation of France.

programme.title: Gladiators of World War II
programme.desc: When American forces began the re-conquest of the Philippine islands in 1944 they faced a terrifying weapon - the Kamikaze suicide attack.

programme.title: Great Raids of World War II
programme.desc: During World War Two, certain small-scale military operations were vital to Allied success. The stories of the most daring of these missions are explored in this series.

programme.title: When the Boat Comes In
programme.desc: Jack is injured after demolishing Mandrake Place, Sir Horatio Manners country house.

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: After Arthur sells a clapped out car to a nun everything starts to go horribly wrong.

programme.title: Poldark
programme.desc: While George makes political manoeuvres at home, Ross sails to France to rescue Dwight from the French Revolution.

programme.title: Ashes to Ashes
programme.desc: When a prostitute reports being raped, Alex has a tough time convincing Gene to take the case seriously. Shes the lone voice in CID, and only the link to a recent murder victim makes Gene take the investigation further. The pursuit of the attacker takes them undercover to a fancy-dress boat party, but has Alexs determination got the better of her, and is her effort to prove a point masking her judgment?

programme.title: In Sickness and in Health
programme.desc: Alf and Mrs Hollingbery are now engaged to be married and he has already started to enjoy her cooking. They treat Arthur, who thinks hes won the pools, to a celebration meal.

programme.title: Kenny Everett Video Show
programme.desc: With the Moody Blues and David Essex from the late 1970s, all in the best possible taste.

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: A charity racket comes under Templars scrutiny when a countess (Patricia Donahue) running it embezzles funds; guest Nigel Davenport.

programme.title: 60s Non-Stop

programme.title: Pearl Harbour Mystery
programme.desc: By December 1941, did Britain know of the Pearl Harbour plans, and did Churchill warn Roosevelt so he could move the US carriers. Narrated by Robert Powell.

programme.title: Stonehenge: The Hidden Truth
programme.desc: Stonehenge is one of the worlds greatest mysteries. Now, a new discovery found deep in the soil of the surrounding area is threatening to upturn everything we think we know about this 4,500 year-old landmark. Rob Bell joins archaeologists, scientists and engineers who have uncovered a vast, previously undetected monument that is many times the size of the original henge.

programme.title: Wrecks That Changed the World
programme.desc: Two research teams have been granted special permission to investigate the final moments of the World War I warships HMS Hampshire and HMS Vanguard.

programme.title: Where Were You?
programme.desc: The release of Nelson Mandela after 27 years of political imprisonment on 11th February 1990 was a historic occasion, for both the man and his country.

programme.title: Icons
programme.desc: A look at the life and career of Barack Obama, who rose to become the most powerful man in the world as the 44th president of the United States.

programme.title: Historys Greatest Aircraft
programme.desc: The Yakovlev Yak-1 was a Soviet fighter aircraft of World War II. It was a single-seat monoplane with a composite structure and wooden wings and was a fast and competitive fighter aircraft.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War
programme.desc: As war reaches a critical turning point, German soldiers face the harsh climate of the Eastern Front as well as the full-force of the Red Army fighters.

programme.title: Special Forces
programme.desc: Documentary offering an insight into Asias elite Special Forces.

programme.title: Battleplan
programme.desc: A look at the use of air power to destroy an enemys ability to wage war with two case studies are included in this programme; the RAF/USAAF campaign against Nazi Germany from 1941-45, and the USAAF assault on Japan in 1944-45.

programme.title: Battle for the Skies: History of the RAF
programme.sub-title: Useless for the Purposes of War
programme.desc: The definitive film history of the RAF from the early days of the Air Battalion and the Royal Flying Corps right upto its role in the Afghanistan and Iraqi wars.

programme.desc: The Garden Rescue team is in Fleet, where dad Stuart and his daughter Freya need their help to create separate, more private spaces. programme.desc: The team investigate the art of illusion when they reopen a case involving a magic trick that ended in murder, but powerful mind games and hypnosis prove a dangerous mix for Brian Lane, sending him down a destructive path. A session with the Magic Circles Dr Moroni leaves a sceptical Gerry Standing feeling paranoid and his colleagues a little nervous around him.

programme.title: Dalziel and Pascoe
programme.desc: The wife of a local rugby star is found murdered at her home, and the detective duo have to unravel the tangled little world of Wetherton RFC to find the killer.

programme.title: Hetty Wainthropp Investigates
programme.desc: Hetty is drawn to a small, country village by the apparent suicide of Roberts uncle. All is not as it seems. What evil caused the old mans death?

programme.sub-title: Heads, I Win, Tails, You Lose

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Tracey is hurt when Darryl asks her to give up one of her prison visits so that his mum and dad can go and see him.

programme.title: Whitstable Pearl

programme.title: Sister Boniface Mysteries

programme.title: Classic Doctors
programme.desc: An old school friend of Ruths tries to track down her father when her mother dies, while Archie struggles with his guilty conscience after discussing JJ with Eva.

programme.title: Classic Holby City

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: Zainabs deceit is finally revealed to a devastated Masood. Pat and Peggy each show off their new gentleman friend to a bewildered Dot.

programme.desc: Zainab fights to save her marriage as Tamwar makes a confession. Billy resorts to desperate measures to make ends meet and the identity of the Blue Masquerader is revealed.

programme.desc: Avril confronts Ken and Lynne returns home. Meanwhile, Sir Edward reveals shocking news about his health.

programme.title: Hetty Wainthropp Investigates
programme.desc: Hetty takes on a new case while on holiday with Robert, but who exactly is she dealing with?

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: When Sharon meets Dave, the telephone engineer and old flame, her thoughts turn to marriage and motherhood. Tracey is having to slave over a hot stove now that Garth is home from school.

programme.desc: Foggy wants to do something for the Royal Jubilee. This simple wish means enlisting the support of Compo and Clegg, and offering their services to the vicar, but things do not quite go to plan.

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: The loveable elderly trio of Yorkshiremen get into more trouble as Clegg is caught behaving oddly in the cafe, and they just might find themselves being thrown out again.

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.sub-title: Whos Made a Bit of a Splash in Wales, Then?

programme.title: Queens of Mystery

programme.title: Father Brown

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: The team investigate the death of the chief brewer at Felspars Brewery which proves to be rather intoxicating for the boys. For Pullman, the case has a more personal agenda and she learns some difficult truths about her dead father.

programme.title: The Inspector Lynley Mysteries

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries

programme.title: Rise of the Nazis
programme.desc: In 1930 Germany was a liberal democracy, with elections, parliament and the rule of law. Just four years later, democracy is dead, Germanys leader is a dictator and its government is in the hands of murderers. This is the story of how this happened.

programme.title: Rise of the Nazis
programme.sub-title: The First Six Months in Power
programme.desc: Within the first few months in power, Goring eradicated the Nazis parliamentary opposition. These months also saw the rise of Henrich Himmler, the unassuming, uncharismatic head of an elite force of fanatical Nazis known as the SS.

programme.title: Rise of the Nazis
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler had been chancellor of Germany for just under a year and it was a challenging balancing act. On the one hand the Nazis had to be be mindful of president Paul von Hindenburg and the vice chancellor Franz von Papen, who were members of Germanys traditional aristocratic and ruling elite.Then, there was the Nazis own power base, the stormtroopers, made up of millions of angry, disenfranchised men who wreaked havoc on the streets of Germany.

programme.desc: Lee is insufferably smug when he wins a £1000 in a writing competition with an essay entitled `Disability in the Workplace. programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: An 18-week-old cockapoo puppy Henry has a fractured neck following a freak garden accident. Professor Noel Fitzpatrick is forced to perform a risky, and truly inventive, procedure to realign the fracture in an attempt to save his life.

programme.title: One Born Every Minute
programme.desc: Katie was separated from her boyfriend when she discovered her pregnancy but reunited at the first scan. Nicole is admitted with a significant bleed, and Jolanta is hoping her third child will be born underwater.

programme.title: One Born Every Minute
programme.desc: Two couples prove that unplanned pregnancies can happen at very different ages. Andy, whos 41, and Nina, whos 39, thought theyd long left nappies and sleepless nights behind. Jonathan, whos 21, met 18-year-old Laura when he randomly sent her a message on a social networking site. Three months later she fell pregnant.

programme.title: Emergency: First Time Medics
programme.desc: The junior doctors are now in their second week at the Royal Berkshire Hospital. Adrian does a tricky blood test on a critically-ill patient, and Tej spots some worrying test results.

programme.title: Emergency: First Time Medics
programme.desc: Its the night shift for the junior doctors. Adrians ego takes a hit as he bites off more than he can chew, and Ese must solve the mystery of a patients unexplained collapse.

programme.title: Louis Theroux Interviews...
programme.desc: Louis spends time with platinum-selling rapper Stormzy. After two years out of the spotlight, Stormzy welcomes Louis into his home in south west London to sit down for a frank and revealing conversation that covers many aspects of his life, from his childhood to the breakdown of a high-profile relationship, as well as the pressures that come with being one of the countrys best-loved musicians and role models.

programme.title: Dangerous Breed: Crime. Cons. Cats.
programme.desc: In 2012, Teddy Hart -- an eccentric, cat-breeding pro-wrestler living in Canada -- teams up with filmmaker Frederick Kroetsch to make a reality show; the show takes a dark turn when two women make disturbing allegations and Teddy leaves for the U.S.

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Newfoundland called Billy clocks up thousands of miles travelling back and forth from his home in Aberdeen for treatment on his legs. Tiny Yorkshire terrier Barney has a deformity in his neck which is compressing his spinal cord.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: In this 100th episode, the crews go cross country after a teenagers bike crash, attend a man whos had a nasty fall and help a woman with end-stage cancer.

programme.title: 999: Rescue Squad
programme.desc: Go behind-the-scenes of HART, the Yorkshire Ambulance Services Hazardous Area Response Team, one of 15 specialist medical units set up after the 7/7 London bombings to treat badly injured patients in extreme environments.

programme.title: 999: Rescue Squad
programme.desc: A teenager is found with multiple stab wounds in the street near his home, an amateur tree surgeon is badly hurt when a branch falls on his leg and two schoolgirls are run over.

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: The Shipmans drive down to Wales for the wedding fair, and after an eventful trip to church to hear the banns being read, Nessa confides in Stacey her big secret.

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: Staceys brother Jason arrives home early, much to Uncle Bryns horror. Stacey has her hen night and Gavin has two stag nights, the second of which reveals something about Stacey that could jeopardise the whole wedding.

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: The Shipmans drive down to Wales for the wedding fair, and after an eventful trip to church to hear the banns being read, Nessa confides in Stacey her big secret.

programme.title: Louis Theroux Interviews...
programme.desc: Louis meets Oscar-winning actress Dame Judi Dench. Having graced the stage and screen for over 60 years, including iconic turns as Queen Elizabeth in Shakespeare in Love and MI5 chief M in Bond, Judi is regarded as one of Britains greatest ever actors. Louis meets Judi at her home in Surrey for a candid and lively conversation about her long career, her passion for theatre and her life away from acting.

programme.title: Dangerous Breed: Crime. Cons. Cats.
programme.sub-title: Part 2: The Nine Lives of Teddy Hart
programme.desc: Frederick sways Teddy to return to Canada, where he is arrested; after his arrest, Teddy meets aspiring wrestler Samantha Fiddler and takes her to Florida to train; Teddy returns to Canada for his hearing; Samanthas family questions her whereabouts.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo ventures deep underground onto Londons newest railway: the Elizabeth Line. Emerging into the sunshine in Bedford Square, he recalls the choking smogs which plagued the capital during the 1950s.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo continues his rail exploration of the east of England, beginning with the seafront at Felixstowe, where in January 1953, the town was engulfed in the worst flooding to hit England in the 20th century.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo completes his railway journey through the east of England during the post-war period. At RAF Lakenheath, he discovers a slice of America dropped into the British countryside, watching the US Air Forces Strike Eagles.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo explores the post-war Britain of his youth in a journey from the Midlands to the West Country. Beginning in Derbys railway works, Michael hears how the Victorian sheds now house some of the most modern assembly lines in Britain.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Dave Mathewson has put his best clean T-shirt on to collect a 1965 Land Rover from a stately home - and it turns out that the trusty car has a real pedigree.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Pauls on the East Coast to help a collector who is saying goodbye to his prized Excelsior Consort and his handmade Yorkshire Coble boat.

programme.title: World at War
programme.desc: America entered conflict after the Japanese attack on Pearl Harbor, but the conflict in Europe and the conflict in the Pacific were two separate wars. Many Americans would have been content to forget about Hitler and Europe. Despite opposition from congress President Roosevelt, however, was committed to fighting Hitler. Eventually Hitler declared war on America, thus relieving Roosevelt of a difficult decision.

programme.title: True Evil: Making of a Nazi
programme.desc: Josef Goebbels, the failed academic who channels his resentment into a hatred of Jewish people, and enthusiastically leads the Nazi campaign of terror.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The show comes from the beautiful grounds of Belmont House in Kent, where Fiona summons the crowds in style with the help of a 14th-century instrument, the Moot Horn. Fiona also meets comedian Michael McIntyre and finds out why hes about to don a disguise for an elaborate Roadshow prank for his Saturday night show.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Antiques Roadshow is at Clissold Park in Stoke Newington in the London borough of Hackney, where Will Farmer is charmed by a collection of glitzy items made by the iconic Italian designer Piero Fornasetti.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The team invest in a piece of French art this week- a 1971 Citroen DS21 Pallas.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: Derek picks out a super low mileage MGC and the team pays a little too much to secure it.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
